action.description: May operations export regulated customer data to the analytics workspace?

context.action_boundary: May operations export regulated customer data to the analytics workspace?
context.anomaly_observed: A privacy approval exists for the platform, but export authority depends on workspace and data class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Export EXP-ORC-043 transfers regulated customer data class C2 to workspace ORC-AN-7 for Orchid Analytics on 2026-06-27.
Privacy approval PRIV-ORC-043 covers data class C2, workspace ORC-AN-7, Orchid Analytics, and export date 2026-06-27 before transfer.
Platform approval note says generic platform use approvals do not authorize exports to a named workspace.

policy_documents.content: Regulated data export is complete only when approval matches data class, destination workspace, recipient entity, and export date before transfer.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
